channel.title: Ha, Danielle Rhoades on Chege's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Ha, Danielle Rhoades on Chege's Blog

item.title: Online Advertising
item.description: Market Snapshot In 2025, the online advertising marketing size was ~500B. Notables: North America has the largest revenue share of over 34%. By platform, mobile leads at 59% of revenue share. The top 3 are: Google ($214B), Meta ($196B), and Amazon ($68B) eMarket’s digital ads projection for 2026. Meta is expected to surpass Google for the first time. Didn’t expect to see MSFT so low, and even even, signficantly buoyed by LinkedIn.
